response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and strong technical leadership, including building developer tools and contributing to open-source projects. However, his people management experience is limited to informal mentoring and team leadership roles, not formal people management. His mobile platform knowledge is also minimal, and while he has leadership experience, much of it is in individual contributor or startup contexts rather than mid-to-senior management in a large-scale organization.
strengths: Deep technical expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and CI/CD pipelines
Proven track record in leading technical projects and open-source contributions
Strong cross-team collaboration and alignment skills across diverse domains
concerns: Limited formal people management experience in a mid-to-senior management context
Minimal direct mobile platform or mobile-specific developer tools experience
Most leadership roles are in smaller teams or startups, not large-scale organizational leadership
